chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application Nos. 1477, 1478 & 1479 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No. 14. 2. For order on CMA No. 657/25. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No. 658/25. 23.12.2025 Mr. Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate for applicant. Matter is pending since 2023 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Learned counsel states that impugned judgment dated 08.05.2023 is no longer in field as the same has been rectified. Under such circumstances, no case is made out to entertain these references, which are dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected file. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
